Roll 6s!.comment: Handled by the 'Roll 6s!' Studio Flow — rolls 2D6; boxcars (sum=12) fires a firework-salvo, anything else a short sticker-rain.

Roll 1s!.comment: Handled by the 'Roll 1s!' Studio Flow — rolls 2D6; snake eyes (sum=2) fires confetti, anything else a couple of chiming balloons.

Roll for Pairs.comment: Handled by the 'Roll for Pairs' Studio Flow — rolls 2D6; matching pair (~17%) fires a balloon burst, any miss drops one chiming balloon.

Roll for Luck.comment: Handled by the 'D20 Roll of Fate' Studio Flow — rolls a 3D D20; crit (20) fires balloons + salvo, fumble (1) fires sticker-rain.

Kaprekar's Curse.comment: Handled by the 'Kaprekar's Curse' Studio Flow

Mystery Box.comment: Handled by the 'Mystery Box' Studio Flow

_comment: Add more redeems here. Key = exact Channel Point reward title in Twitch.
